parsed.cleanedTranscript:
Speaker 1: They want you afraid.
Speaker 1: Fear makes you easier to control.
Speaker 1: It's time to wake up.
Speaker 2: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.
Speaker 2: Raul Menendez, United Global Unrest.
Speaker 1: On an unprecedented scale.
Speaker 3: Menendez is a terrorist.
Speaker 3: We're bringing peace and security to the world.
Speaker 1: He refuses to let me go.
Speaker 2: Stop looking backwards, David, but what matters is what we do next.
Speaker 1: A lot of people counting on us for answers.
Speaker 2: The world is on the brink of collapse.
Speaker 1: We cannot let him win, David. We have to stop him.
Speaker 2: It's too late for that. The damage is already done.
Speaker 3: Specter One, report.
Speaker 1: We need a sitrep.
Speaker 1: This isn't real.
Speaker 2: The hell it ain't.
Speaker 1: Pull it together, man!
Speaker 2: So eager to leave, David.
Speaker 2: Killing a man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
Speaker 3: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
Speaker 1: No more games. This ends now.
Speaker 4: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you pre-order now.

auditTrail.detail: Standardized all speaker tags to consistent 'Speaker N' formatting across chunks.
Carried forward the boundary fragment 'on an unprecedented scale.' as a continuation and capitalized it for readability; no duplicate text removed.
Omitted empty final chunk with no detected speech from the cleaned transcript.
Applied light punctuation cleanup and preserved wording without adding new dialogue.

debug.notes: Cleaned the mechanically stitched dialogue into a continuous readable transcript. No explicit duplicated boundary fragments were present; chunk 1 begins mid-thought, so it was retained as-is aside from capitalization. No non-speech music/chanting text existed in the mechanical transcript, so none was added.

stitch.cleanedTranscript:
Speaker 1: They want you afraid.
Speaker 1: Fear makes you easier to control.
Speaker 1: It's time to wake up.
Speaker 2: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.
Speaker 2: Raul Menendez, United Global Unrest.
Speaker 1: On an unprecedented scale.
Speaker 3: Menendez is a terrorist.
Speaker 3: We're bringing peace and security to the world.
Speaker 1: He refuses to let me go.
Speaker 2: Stop looking backwards, David, but what matters is what we do next.
Speaker 1: A lot of people counting on us for answers.
Speaker 2: The world is on the brink of collapse.
Speaker 1: We cannot let him win, David. We have to stop him.
Speaker 2: It's too late for that. The damage is already done.
Speaker 3: Specter One, report.
Speaker 1: We need a sitrep.
Speaker 1: This isn't real.
Speaker 2: The hell it ain't.
Speaker 1: Pull it together, man!
Speaker 2: So eager to leave, David.
Speaker 2: Killing a man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
Speaker 3: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
Speaker 1: No more games. This ends now.
Speaker 4: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you pre-order now.
